To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will involve basic commands such as init, add, and 
commit. Below is the implementation of these commands in C.                     

File: main.c                                                                    

                                                                                
#include <stdio.h>                                                              
                                                                                
#include <stdlib.h>                                                             
                                                                                
#include <string.h>                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
#define MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH 256                                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
typedef struct {                                                                
                                                                                
    char filename[MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH];                                         
                                                                                
    char content[1024]; // Simplified for demonstration purposes                
                                                                                
} File;                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
File files[100];                                                                
                                                                                
int file_count = 0;                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
void init() {                                                                   
                                                                                
    if (file_count > 0) {                                                       
                                                                                
        printf("Repository already initialized.\n");                            
                                                                                
        return;                                                                 
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
    printf("Initialized empty repository.\n");                                  
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
void add(const char *filename) {                                                
                                                                                
    for (int i = 0; i < file_count; i++) {                                      
                                                                                
        if (strcmp(files[i].filename, filename) == 0) {                         
                                                                                
            printf("File already added: %s\n", filename);                       
                                                                                
            return;                                                             
                                                                                
        }                                                                       
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if (file_count >= 100) {                                                    
                                                                                
        printf("Repository is full.\n");                                        
                                                                                
        return;                                                                 
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    FILE *file = fopen(filename, "r");                                          
                                                                                
    if (!file) {                                                                
                                                                                
        printf("File not found: %s\n", filename);                               
                                                                                
        return;                                                                 
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    File new_file;                                                              
                                                                                
    strcpy(new_file.filename, filename);                                        
                                                                                
    fread(new_file.content, 1, sizeof(new_file.content), file);                 
                                                                                
    fclose(file);                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    files[file_count++] = new_file;                                             
                                                                                
    printf("Added file: %s\n", filename);                                       
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
void commit(const char *message) {                                              
                                                                                
    if (file_count == 0) {                                                      
                                                                                
        printf("No files to commit.\n");                                        
                                                                                
        return;                                                                 
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    printf("Committing...\n");                                                  
                                                                                
    for (int i = 0; i < file_count; i++) {                                      
                                                                                
        printf("File: %s\n", files[i].filename);                                
                                                                                
        printf("Content:\n%s\n", files[i].content);                             
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
    printf("Message: %s\n", message);                                           
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {                                              
                                                                                
    if (argc < 2) {                                                             
                                                                                
        fprintf(stderr, "Usage: minigit <command> [args]\n");                   
                                                                                
        return 1;                                                               
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    const char *command = argv[1];                                              
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if (strcmp(command, "init") == 0) {                                         
                                                                                
        init();                                                                 
                                                                                
    } else if (strcmp(command, "add") == 0 && argc > 2) {                       
                                                                                
        add(argv[2]);                                                           
                                                                                
    } else if (strcmp(command, "commit") == 0 && argc > 2) {                    
                                                                                
        commit(argv[2]);                                                        
                                                                                
    } else {                                                                    
                                                                                
        fprintf(stderr, "Unknown command: %s\n", command);                      
                                                                                
        return 1;                                                               
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    return 0;                                                                   
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                

File: Makefile                                                                  

                                                                                
minigit: main.c                                                                 
                                                                                
    gcc -o minigit main.c                                                       
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -f minigit                                                               
                                                                                

Explanation of Changes:                                                         

 1 main.c: This file contains the implementation of minigit with basic commands 
   init, add, and commit.                                                       
    • init: Initializes an empty repository.                                    
    • add: Adds a file to the repository.                                       
    • commit: Commits all added files with a message.                           
 2 Makefile: This file provides a simple build script to compile the minigit    
   executable.                                                                  

Running the Implementation:                                                     

 1 Compile the code using make minigit.                                         
 2 Run the commands as described in SPEC-v1.txt.                                

This implementation is a basic version control system and can be extended with  
more features as needed.
